arts.sum: Real Madrid lodged a formal complaint to the RFEF over the standard of officiating in Spain, suggesting they are intentionally treated unfairly.

arts.ttl: Barcelona considering transfer swoop for 27-year-old Crystal Palace star
arts.sum: Barcelona are reportedly considering a surprise transfer move for Crystal Palace striker Jean-Philippe Mateta for this summer. The Frenchman has been in fine form for the Eagles in the last year or so, though he’s not necessarily someone you’d expect to be seeing linked with the very biggest names in European club football.
